entries.label: Amount of sediment, water, and/or oil accumulation (inches)
Material on top of filters? (if applicable)

entry_values.text: None - no sediment in basin or at infall/outfall pipes
Minimal - only at infall/outfall pipe but not obstructing drainage
Moderate - at infall/outfall pipes and obstructing drainage
Excessive - at infall/outfall pipes and in basin obstructing drainage
Normal - detention pond, vegetated swale or water level a normal pool
High - detention pond or vegetated swale holding water or above normal pool

conditions.value: High - detention pond or vegetated swale holding water or above normal pool

entries.label: Filter Media, Skimmer, Inserts, Separators, etc.:
Is there excessive wear and tear (cracks, settling)?
Sump Pump or Lift Station Present?
